name: Lentil Soup
tagline: Brown lentil soup with carrot, celery, lemon, parsley
highlight: Plant protein under $5 a pot, no eggs anywhere

hero.alt: Bowl of lentil soup with carrots, parsley, and lemon wedge
hero.caption: lentil soup — bright, fiber-rich

healthFacts: Brown lentils have ~18g protein and 16g fiber per cooked cup.
Lemon at the end boosts iron absorption from the lentils.

steps.title: Soffritto
steps.detail: Sweat onion, carrot, celery in olive oil over medium 8 minutes. Add garlic, cook 1 minute more.
steps.tip: Dice everything to lentil size — visual harmony matters.

steps.title: Bloom the cumin
steps.detail: Stir in cumin and cook 30 seconds until fragrant — toasting unlocks the oil-soluble flavors.
steps.tip: Fresh-ground cumin smells night-and-day better than pre-ground.

steps.title: Simmer with stock
steps.detail: Stir in lentils and stock. Bring to a boil, then simmer 25 minutes until lentils are tender but still hold shape.
steps.tip: No salt yet — it slows lentil softening. Salt at the end.

steps.title: Brighten and serve
steps.detail: Salt to taste. Squeeze in lemon and stir in chopped parsley off heat.
steps.tip: Lemon wakes the soup up — without it the soup tastes flat.

media.alt: Lentil soup with lemon and parsley
media.caption: brighten and serve
